findings.description: The prose description "`ParameterizedSqlPStatement.executeUpdateByMap(Map)` でMapのデータを1件更新する。" has no basis in the source. The source section contains only a code example (with an inline comment `// 登録対象のMapを生成する。`) and no prose description sentence.
findings.source_evidence: Source section "1件のデータを更新する場合" contains only the code block starting with `// 登録対象のMapを生成する。` — no descriptive sentence is present.
